The [[Master slave dialectic]] causes substantial impairment to mirroring.<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n1flcGrb81M</ref>

== See Also ==

* [[Lord–bondsman dialectic]]

== References ==
[[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Master slave dialectic]][[Category:Alienators]]
[[sn:Master slave dialectic]][[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Master slave dialectic]][[sn:Master slave dialectic]]
[[Category:Pages]]
